content:
# How to Build a Content Calendar with AI Tools in 2026

A content calendar keeps you organized and consistent. AI tools make building and maintaining one easier than ever!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more tools.

---

## Step 1: Choose Your Planning Tool

Use Notion AI or [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] to create your content calendar.

### Notion AI for Content Planning
- **Templates**: Start with ready-made content calendar templates
- **AI suggestions**: Get ideas for what to post
- **Team collaboration**: Work with your team in one place

---

## Step 2: Generate Content Ideas with AI

Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] or ChatGPT to brainstorm content ideas for each day or week.

Try prompts like:
- "Give me 10 content ideas for next week about [your topic]"
- "What holidays or events should I create content about this month?"

---

## Step 3: Create Content in Advance

Batch create content using AI tools:
- **[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]**: Write captions and copy
- **[[link:/tools/4|Canva]]**: Create all your graphics
- **[[link:/tools/51|VEED]]**: Edit video content

---

## Step 4: Schedule and Automate

Use scheduling tools to auto-post your content at the best times for your audience.

---

## Our Recommended Content Calendar Toolkit

| Task | Tool |
|------|------|
| Planning & organizing | Notion AI |
| Generating ideas | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] |
| Creating graphics | [[link:/tools/4|Canva]] |
| Video content | [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] |

Ready to build your content calendar? Start with these AI tools today!

For more insights, check out How to Use AI for Email Marketing
